description.fr: This is the "Sadist Mark" spell, borrowed from the Eniripsa class. The Huppermage places a mark on their target. If the Huppermage casts the spell again on a marked target, the mark explodes in an area of effect, causing other marks in the AoE to explode. If the Huppermage has an Air rune, the mark placed is immediately triggered. The mark can't be placed on a summons.
